Finance AI · Recurring Costs
High confidenceLedger + recurring rulesUpdated today 06:14
Fixed-cost ratio
Fixed costs are 13.5% of revenue — healthy
Your committed monthly spend sits well under the 20% benchmark for a business this size. There's room, but the variance below is worth a look.
Price increases
3 services raised prices this month — $780 more
Cloud Hosting (+$340), the analytics suite (+$290) and a logistics retainer (+$150) all went up without a renewal. Worth confirming each was expected.
Unused subscription
Design Suite Pro — zero usage in 60 days
You're paying $590/month for a seat nobody has logged into since March. Cancelling recovers $7,080 a year. This is the one most worth acting on today.
